events.event: US-Israel strikes on Iranian nuclear and military sites commence
Iran imposes transit restrictions on Strait of Hormuz; tanker traffic slows
Brent crude breaks $90/bbl for first time in 12 months
IEA announces coordinated 400M barrel emergency stockpile release
Australian fuel companies report supply disruptions; DCCEEW switches MSO reporting to weekly
Minister Bowen announces Australia will contribute 762M litres to IEA release via MSO reduction
Australia activates emergency fuel reserves — 213M L petrol + 548M L diesel authorised for drawdown
Fuel quality standards temporarily relaxed to accept broader range of import specifications
6 scheduled tanker shipments to Australia cancelled/deferred for April
NSW station outages peak at 314 of 2,417 stations (13%)
ACCC authorises fuel majors to coordinate supply during crisis; launches probe into independent supply restrictions
National outage count: 608 of 7,798 stations affected (7.8%)
